title: The Farm
description: A cozy 1.21.1 Fabric farming modpack with seasons, Farmer's Delight, food, animals, ambience, countryside exploration, visual polish, and performance mods.
body:
# The Farm

The Farm is a cozy Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric farming modpack built around seasons, food, animals, ambience, and countryside exploration.

Grow crops, cook meals, explore beautiful terrain, build a peaceful farm, discover villages and wildlife, and enjoy a relaxed survival experience with modern performance and visual polish.

## Why Play The Farm?

- Cozy farming and food progression
- Farmer's Delight Refabricated and Nemo's Farming
- Seasons with Fabric Seasons and seasonal farming compatibility
- Beautiful countryside world generation with Terralith, Tectonic, Explorify, and Wilder Wild
- Animals, villages, bees, mooblooms, snails, and nature-focused exploration
- Fresh Animations, better leaves, ambient sounds, footsteps, particles, and shader-friendly visuals
- Sodium, Lithium, Iris, Indium, Dynamic FPS, and performance-focused optimization
- Waystones, Nature's Compass, Comforts, Carry On, BetterF3, REI, and more quality-of-life mods

## Perfect For

- Cozy survival players
- Farming modpack players
- Farmer's Delight fans
- Vanilla+ players
- Builders who want a peaceful countryside world
- Players who want ambience, seasons, animals, and exploration without heavy tech progression

## Recommended

Shaders are optional, but recommended for the best atmosphere. Use Iris with BSL, Complementary, or another shader you like.
